summary: End-to-end testing of WANA MVP (backend + frontend). 21/21 pytest backend tests passing after a transient LLM budget hiccup recovered. All major frontend pages render, all critical interactive elements have data-testid attributes, and integrations are working (regulations, alerts, territories+Leaflet map, evidence packs, impact brief via Claude Sonnet 4.5, PDF export, dashboard summary, language toggle, mobile nav).

minor.issue: Returns raw 500 'Internal Server Error' when Emergent LLM budget is exhausted. Should catch emergentintegrations.llm.chat.ChatError and surface a user-friendly 502/503 message (e.g. 'LLM service unavailable / budget exceeded').
POST returns 200 (not 201). Cosmetic — should be 201 for creation per REST conventions.

ui_bugs.issue: Document <title> is still 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of WANA branding.

Each regulation row renders TWICE in DOM (24 elements with prefix `monitor-row-` for 12 regs). Looks like a desktop+mobile dual render — confirm only one is visible per breakpoint; if so, no real bug. If both are visible at the same time on any viewport it would double-list rows.

action_items: Wrap _generate_brief() Claude call in try/except for emergentintegrations.llm.chat.ChatError and return HTTPException(502, detail='AI service temporarily unavailable') so frontend can show a clean toast.
Update <title> in /app/frontend/public/index.html to 'WANA — Wilayah Adat Nusantara Accountability'.
Optional: change POST creation endpoints to return 201.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 783 lines — consider splitting into routers/seed/llm modules once it grows further.
_extract_text_from_pdf is synchronous and runs in the event loop on /impact-brief/upload — for large PDFs this can block. Consider running in a threadpool (asyncio.to_thread).
ImpactBrief.confidence is not range-validated (Pydantic accepts any float). Add Field(ge=0, le=1).
AlertSubscription model accepts arbitrary `contact` string — no email/phone validation.
@app.on_event is deprecated in FastAPI; prefer lifespan context manager.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed evidence pack, alert subscription, and impact brief via tests. Two evidence packs now exist (1 from UI test, 1 from pytest).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_wana_backend.py — run with `pytest -v`. Public URL from /app/frontend/.env (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL). EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget can throttle the /api/impact-brief/generate endpoint intermittently (litellm BadRequestError: Budget exceeded). If you hit a 500 there, retry after a few seconds or surface it as a known intermittent until the budget is raised. All UI elements expose data-testid per /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds/wana.js.
rca of the issue: The lone backend failure during first pytest run (test_impact_brief_generate_and_pdf -> 500) was caused by litellm.BadRequestError: 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.013095, Max budget: 0.001' surfacing from emergentintegrations. The call recovered on a subsequent attempt and the test passed. Mitigation: (1) catch ChatError in _generate_brief and return 502 with friendly message; (2) raise the Emergent LLM key budget in env if persistent.
